name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

Init ==
  /\ participants = <<>>
  /\ coordinator = <<>>
  /\ messages = <<>>

Next ==
  \/ /\ participants' = Append(participants, <<>>)
     /\ messages' = messages
  \/ /\ coordinator' = <<>>
     /\ messages' = messages
  \/ /\ messages' = Append(messages, <<>>)
     /\ participants' = participants
     /\ coordinator' = coordinator

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
ForkOwner(i) == forks[i]
PhilosopherState(i) == states[i]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking" /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if hungry and forks are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = 0 /\ forks[Left(i)] = 0
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Left(i)] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![Left(i)] = 0]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Invariant: No two philosophers share a fork *)
TypeOK == /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] \in 0..N
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] = i
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : states[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N : /\ flag[i] = FALSE
                     /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                     /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = Max([num[j] | j \in 1..N]) + 1]
                     /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* TypeOK: *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ K \in Nat
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ count \in 0..K

(* Init: *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ count = 0

(* Next: *)
Next == 
  (* Producer action *)
  \/ /\ count < K
     /\ head' = head
     /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
     /\ count' = count + 1
     /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  (* Append a dummy element *)
  \/ (* Consumer action *)
     /\ count > 0
     /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
     /\ tail' = tail
     /\ count' = count - 1
     /\ q' = Tail(q)  (* Remove the first element *)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : r \in readers
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : r \notin readers
              /\ writer_active' = TRUE
                 /\ readers' = <<>>
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLE store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]

Next == /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY, Chunks
VARIABLES ackedChunks, channelState, currentChunk, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks


(* Helper definitions *)
chunkSize == CHUNK_SIZE
fileSize == FILE_SIZE
maxRetries == MAX_RETRIES
channelLossProb == CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY

(* Compute the number of chunks needed to send the file *)
numChunks == Ceil(fileSize \div chunkSize)

(* Define the chunks as a sequence of byte sequences *)
chunks == [i \in 1..numChunks |-> 

                 SubSeq(file, (i-1)*chunkSize + 1, i*chunkSize)

                 SubSeq(file, (i-1)*chunkSize + 1, fileSize)
           ]

(* Define the initial state *)
Init == /\ file \in Seq(1..256)  (* file is a sequence of bytes *)
        /\ Len(file) = fileSize
        /\ sentChunks = {}  (* no chunks have been sent yet *)
        /\ ackedChunks = {}  (* no chunks have been acknowledged yet *)
        /\ retransmitCount = 0
        /\ currentChunk = 1
        /\ channelState = "idle"

(* Define the Next action *)
Next == 
    (* If the channel is idle, send the next chunk *)
    /\ channelState = "idle"
    /\ currentChunk <= numChunks
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {currentChunk}
    /\ channelState' = "sending"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount>>

    \/ (* If the channel is sending, decide whether the message is lost *)
    /\ channelState = "sending"
    /\ IF Random < channelLossProb THEN
           (* Message is lost *)
           /\ channelState' = "idle"
           /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
           /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, currentChunk>>

           (* Message is received *)
           /\ channelState' = "acknowledged"
           /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {currentChunk}
           /\ retransmitCount' = 0
           /\ IF currentChunk < numChunks THEN
                  currentChunk' = currentChunk + 1

                  currentChunk' = currentChunk
           /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks>>

    \/ (* If the channel is acknowledged, check if retransmissions are needed *)
    /\ channelState = "acknowledged"
    /\ IF currentChunk <= numChunks THEN
           (* Check if the current chunk has been acknowledged *)

               (* Move to the next chunk *)
               /\ channelState' = "idle"
               /\ currentChunk' = currentChunk + 1
               /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount>>

               (* Retransmit if retries remain *)

                   /\ channelState' = "idle"
                   /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
                   /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, currentChunk>>

                   (* Give up after max retries *)
                   /\ channelState' = "idle"
                   /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunk>>

           (* All chunks have been acknowledged *)
           /\ channelState' = "idle"
           /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunk>>

(* Define the specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunk, channelState>>

(* Define the type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ file \in Seq(1..256)
          /\ Len(file) = fileSize
          /\ chunks \in [1..numChunks -> Seq(1..256)]
          /\ sentChunks \in SUBSET 1..numChunks
          /\ ackedChunks \in SUBSET 1..numChunks
          /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
          /\ currentChunk \in 1..numChunks
          /\ channelState \in {"idle", "sending", "acknowledged"}

====
